summary: A Go-based monolithic testing and reporting framework with extensive AI-agent-generated test suites and MCP integration.
concerns: high volume of generated extra tests suggests potential flakiness or coverage gaps
deeply nested agent-generated directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/) pollute the repository
staged changes during active development might indicate incomplete commits
suggestions: consolidate or archive the GOrchestra agent-generated test directories
review baseline test stability to reduce the need for continuous extra test generation
ensure MCP handler logic is covered by standard tests rather than just extra tests
